base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of koopa_beach_variants — a tile from 1992 super mario kart. Koopa Beach 1-2 (asset IDs 6876/81340) — beach/water-hazard tracks. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
